options.name: --caching
options.description:
Enables caching of the starred GitHub repositories
retrieved from the GitHub API (useful during development and
testing)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Prints the post to the console without posting to Bluesky
or saving history

options.name: --footer
options.description:
Include a footer in the post with a link to this
project

options.name: --header
options.description: A custom header to use for the post

options.name: --token
options.description: Token for access to the GitHub API
